product_updates.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
product_updates.content: The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January 2026.

product_updates.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
product_updates.content: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s relationship with the Trump administration seems to be thawing
product_updates.content: Despite recently being designated a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon, Anthropic is still talking to high-level members of the Trump administration.

product_updates.title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why
product_updates.content: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.
